case_title: JENNIFER KOPCZYNSKI et al VS. STEVE PADIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD.A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED AS FOLLOWS:

SC-108A ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY STEVE PADIS ON FEB-22-2013 - DENIED. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPCZYNSKI, JENNIFER
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-108A ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED SEP-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE D.B.A. JEWELRY PLUS ENTERPRICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOPCZYNSKI, JENNIFER KOPCZYNSKI, JAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE D.B.A. JEWELRY PLUS ENTERPRICES $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN DECEMBER 28, 2012, AND WITH THE COOPERATION OF PLAINTIFF, SET THE DIAMONDS IN A NEW SETTING COMPARABLE IN STYLE TO THE PREVIOUS SETTING OF PLAINTIFF'S RING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE D.B.A. JEWELRY PLUS ENTERPRICES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY KOPCZYNSKI, JENNIFER KOPCZYNSKI, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE D.B.A. JEWELRY PLUS ENTERPRICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANT'S SON GEORGE PADIS APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPCZYNSKI, JENNIFER
